name: Mandeltorte (Almond Torte) Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature (70 degrees Fahrenheit) before starting.
3. Sift the flour.
4. Beat the egg yolks.
5. Gradually add the sugar to the egg yolks and beat until creamy.
6. Add the lemon rind, lemon juice, cinnamon, ground almonds, bread crumbs, and almond extract.
7. Whip the egg whites until stiff but not dry.
8. Gently fold the whipped egg whites into the batter.
9. Pour the batter evenly into 2 (8-inch) ungreased layer cake pans.
10. Bake for about 20 minutes or until set.
11. Allow to cool completely.
12. Carefully remove from the pans and spread Lemon Orange Custard filling between the layers.
13. Sprinkle sifted confectioner's sugar over the top.
